P33 displays calibrated historical frequencies and sealed paper evidence for review. Probabilities are weather, not prophecy: they are measured past frequencies under similar fields, out-of-sample tested, and can fail. It may not say execute, buy, sell, use leverage, allocate size, or promise certainty.
